Position: Entry-Level Manufacturing Process Engineer (Assembly & CI)
A leading engineering company located in Hamel, MN is seeking a Manufacturing Engineer to support assembly operations by developing and implementing efficient manufacturing processes. This role requires a Bachelor's degree in Manufacturing, Industrial, or Mechanical Engineering and offers the opportunity to improve assembly line flow while resolving technical challenges. Hands-on experience through internships is welcomed.
#J-1

WHY DO WE NEED YOU?

The Process Engineer II is a key owner of a production process block. They are responsible for the safety, quality, and productivity performance of the process area. This process block is a critical step in our manufacturing system, and requires a dependable Process Engineer who will ensure continued uptime and quality product throughput.

The Process Engineer II will interface with Production, Quality, Process Development, and Maintenance teams, as well as external vendors
